message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class FileRepository {
  format
  hash
  hostedBy
  IRI
  name
  repositoryType
  storageSize
}

class ContentType
class Hash
class Organization
class FileRepositoryType
class QuantitativeValue

FileRepository --> ContentType : format
FileRepository --> Hash : hash
FileRepository --> Organization : hostedBy
FileRepository --> FileRepositoryType : repositoryType
FileRepository --> QuantitativeValue : storageSize
@enduml
